## Stage Name
What would this node be called in the simulator?

## Purpose
What does this stage do in the pipeline? Where does it sit (pre-retrieval, retrieval, post-retrieval, generation)?

## Inputs / Outputs
| | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Input | | |
| Output | | |

## Observable Events
What SSE events would this stage emit so the simulator and graph can display it?

## Why this belongs in ATLAS
How does making this stage visible improve understanding of the RAG pipeline?

## References
Papers, repos, or prior art that informed this proposal.
